en.extract:
The black-and-rufous swallow (Hirundo nigrorufa) is a species of bird in the family Hirundinidae.


Range
It inhabits the miombo ecosystems of Angola, Democratic Republic of the Congo and Zambia.

The '''black-and-rufous swallow''' ('''''Hirundo nigrorufa''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Hirundinidae]].

==Range==
It inhabits the [[miombo]] ecosystems of [[Angola]], [[Democratic Republic of the Congo]] and [[Zambia]].

[[image:Hirundo nigrorufa 1894.jpg|thumb|left|Illustration dating from 1894]]
[[File:Black-and-rufous Swallow fl 114ND500 DSC3401.jpg|thumb|Black-and-rufous Swallow, flying]]
